mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_class (grade, major, class_name, class_code, counselor_id) VALUES (#{grade}, #{major}, #{class_name}, #{class_code}, #{counselor_id})
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_class SET grade = #{grade}, major = #{major}, class_name = #{class_name}, class_code = #{class_code}, counselor_id = #{counselor_id} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ac.*, t.name as counselor_name FROM admin_class ac LEFT JOIN teacher t ON ac.counselor_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = t.username COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci WHERE ac.id = #{id}

SELECT ac.*, t.name as counselor_name FROM admin_class ac LEFT JOIN teacher t ON ac.counselor_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = t.username COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci
AND ac.grade = #{grade}
AND ac.major LIKE CONCAT('%', #{major}, '%')
AND ac.class_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{class_name}, '%')
AND ac.class_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{class_code}, '%')
ORDER BY ac.grade DESC, ac.major, ac.class_name
